channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Swiss voters set to reject population cap in referendum, avoiding EU clash
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Swiss reject population cap in referendum, avoiding EU clash and cheering business
- Opinion | Switzerland Rejects a Population Cap
- Swiss right-wing plan to cap population rejected by narrow margins
- Swiss reject population cap in referendum, avoiding EU clash and cheering business
- Swiss reject population cap in referendum, avoiding EU clash and cheering business
- Swiss voters appear to reject proposal to cap population at 10 million
- Swiss Voters Narrowly Reject Proposal to Cap Population at 10 Million, Early Results Show
- Swiss voters reject population cap proposal
- Swiss voters reject population cap proposal
- Swiss voters reject right-wing plan to cap population at 10 million
- Swiss voters reject proposal to cap population at 10mn
- Swiss Voters Reject Population Cap to Manage Immigration, Projections Show
- Swiss voters projected to reject population cap proposal
- Swiss voters reject 10 million population cap, early projections say
- Swiss voters projected to reject population cap proposal
- Swiss voters poised to reject 10 million population cap in referendum, projection shows
- Switzerland holds referendum on population cap at 10 million]]>

- Romanian president nominates new candidate for prime minister
- Romanian president nominates new candidate for prime minister
- Romania's president nominates Adrian Vestea as prime minister after his previous pick withdraws
- Romanian president nominates new candidate for PM]]>

item.title: UN chief praises ceasefire framework between Washington and Tehran

- Trump Announces Peace Deal with Iran]]>

item.title: Israeli military strikes Beirut suburbs in lead-up to anticipated U.S.-Iran deal
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Roundup: Israel's strike in Beirut triggers Iranian warnings of retaliation, casting shadow over emerging U.S.-Iran deal
- Iran Peace Deal at Risk After Israeli Strikes on Beirut
- Iran questioning deal with US after Israeli strikes in Lebanon
- Iran questioning deal with US after Israeli strikes in Lebanon
- Israel strikes Beirut, threatening to complicate push for Iran deal
- Israeli military strikes Beirut suburbs in the lead-up to anticipated US-Iran deal]]>

item.title: Putin, Zelensky Discuss Ukraine, Iran Wars With Trump
